summary: Verified School Pod Playbooks, Profile Completeness Alert, and Emma login fix. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Playbooks correctly map signal types to action plan templates.
critical_code_review_comments: Playbook generator correctly prioritizes signals: overdue > stale > no_reply > stalled_stage
Profile completeness uses unified 12-field formula (COMPLETENESS_FIELDS dict in schema_v2_signals.py)
ActionPlan.js has proper data-testid attributes for steps ('playbook-step-{n}')
Success criteria references real names (Jenny McDowell, Emma Chen) from athlete and school_info
School Pod response includes 'playbook' field even when null (no signals)
seed_data_creation: Created test note with TEST_PLAYBOOK_ prefix during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: School Pod Playbooks feature complete. Different signal types map to different playbook titles: overdue->Follow-Up Required, stale->Re-engagement Plan, no_reply->Outreach Strategy, stalled->Stage Advancement Plan. Playbook references real coach names from university_knowledge_base. ActionPlan component has checkable steps with progress bar. Profile Alert shows on Athlete Overview when profile_completeness.score < 80.

frontend_ui: Profile Alert on Athlete Overview - PASS (shows '67% complete — 8 of 12 fields')
School Pod page loads with data-testid='school-pod-page' - PASS
ActionPlan component (data-testid='action-plan') with checkable steps - PASS
Emory playbook title: 'Follow-Up Required' with 4 steps - PASS
Emory playbook references Jenny McDowell and Emma Chen - PASS
Progress bar shows 0/4, updates to 1/4 on step check - PASS
Done when criteria displays correctly - PASS
Creighton playbook title: 'Outreach Strategy' with 5 steps - PASS
Notes sidebar opens via action bar (data-testid='cab-notes') - PASS
Log interaction modal opens via action bar - PASS
Emma login successful - redirects to /board dashboard - PASS
